cards.back: An electronic circuit used to subtract two binary numbers of half the length of the full subtractor
A digital circuit used to subtract two binary numbers of the same length, performing borrow and carry operations
A signal indicating that a value is greater than the bit value, used in subtraction to reduce the result
A signal indicating that a value is greater than the bit value, used in addition to increase the result
A digital circuit used to perform subtraction, providing both borrow and carry signals
